description: How the Homo sapiens structural type ⟨𐑦𐑸𐑾𐑹𐑐𐑧𐑲𐑵⊙𐑫𐑳𐑟⟩ manifests at each design layer

L0_quarks.\ud801\udc66: hadron state space self-written by QCD Lagrangian
L0_quarks.\ud801\udc78: color confinement (self-referential topology of flux tubes)

L1_electrons.\ud801\udc78: Belnap4 logic table (B/T/F/N) as truth-value topology
L1_electrons.\ud801\udc7e: complementary base pairing (B↔T, F↔N) bidirectional coupling

L3_molecules.\ud801\udc50: quantum tunneling in enzyme active sites

L4_proteins.\u2299: folding funnel critical at native state
L4_proteins.\ud801\udc6b: protein folding memory (Markov ∞ — sequence determines structure)

L6_mitosis.\ud801\udc5f: non-Abelian braiding of sister chromatids at anaphase

L7_tissues.\ud801\udc73: heterogeneous cell types within tissue niche

L8_organism.\ud801\udc5f: neural connectome as non-Abelian braid group

\u03bc\u2218\u03b4=id_verification: Each layer independently satisfies Frobenius closure: the operation applied to the system returns the system to a state distinguishable from its starting state only by the information gained.
